Metadata.SourceFile: Cuthbert Enters the Tombs of Doom.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC053 "CUTHBERTENTERSTHETOMBSOFDOOM-0F00-C053" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0f00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cuthbert Enters the Tombs of Doom (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0F00 to set $63 to $00 in order to avoid incorrect sounds when the game starts.
